title: Preparations for wand and wor
body:
Hello,

A few bits are missing, i.e. code generation in particular and I was not certain about what the json representation or wand/wor should look alike, but the parsers should be fine and also the ilang and verilog backends. Also I thought that you may possibly accept the extra netType parameter for the wire class to distinguish the three types.

Of course I do not expect this patch to be accepted at this stage of development and just before a release. But you could possibly give me a quick feedback with an estimate if the way I was approaching the implementation is acceptable for you in principle.

I learned that wand and wor wire-types are not fashionable among professionals. Somehow I had immediately stumbled across them and use them to assign a variable number of wires (~ 30) to a single wor in a generate loop. I would not know how to perform that auto-generation with the | operator, so here I go and hope to be of some help.

Many thanks

Steffen
